title: Interactive Quiz
subtitle: Configure your car for the conditions, then watch relative pace on track.

scenarios.headline: High-degradation Sunday
scenarios.conditions: Ambient 34°C, track surface 52°C, bone-dry asphalt. Rear tires will punish every traction event.

rivals.name: Car 04
rivals.blurb: Conservative — prioritizes thermal stability over peak grip.

rivals.name: Car 77
rivals.blurb: Maximum qualifying-style pace — may struggle with overheating late stint.

scenarios.headline: Standing water — lights out
scenarios.conditions: Race control reports rivers across Turns 3–5. Spray limiting visibility; full wet grooves mandatory until it eases.

rivals.name: Car 18
rivals.blurb: Still on slicks — skating on the surface film.

rivals.name: Car 31
rivals.blurb: Inters — workable but aquaplaning risk where water piles up.

scenarios.headline: Drying racing line
scenarios.conditions: Showers stopped ten minutes ago. A dry line is forming but offline stays greasy — crossover tyre psychology matters.

rivals.name: Car 09
rivals.blurb: Full wets — safe but overheating the tread on the dry stripe.

rivals.name: Car 55
rivals.blurb: Early slicks — heroic offline but fragile if rain returns.
